name: Write File
description: Write full content to a NEW file. Refuses to overwrite existing files — use str_replace (or patch) for edits.

function.name: write_file
function.description: Write content to a file at the specified path. Creates the file if it does not exist. IMPORTANT: This tool is for NEW files ONLY — it REFUSES to overwrite existing files. If the target file already exists, use str_replace (or patch) instead for surgical, line-level edits. Parent directories are created automatically by default.

file_path.description: Absolute or relative path of the file to write.

content.description: Full content to write to the file. Written exactly as provided — no automatic newline is appended.

overwrite.description: DEPRECATED. The write_file tool does NOT overwrite existing files — use str_replace for edits. This flag is ignored.

create_dirs.description: Whether to automatically create missing parent directories. Defaults to true.
